methodology.name: Marketing SENSE
methodology.description: Proprietary 5-phase marketing methodology by Hayas Marketing

step.name: Strategy
step.text: Market analysis, buyer persona definition, and strategic planning

step.name: Execution
step.text: Implementation of branding, web, SEO, content and campaigns

step.name: Nurturing

step.name: Evaluation
step.text: Performance measurement, analytics dashboards and continuous optimization
